seoTitle: Tilba Tilba vs Tilbuster — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Tilba Tilba vs Tilbuster: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tilba Tilba and Tilbuster.
heading: Tilba Tilba vs Tilbuster — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tilba Tilba, New South Wales and Tilbuster, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tilba Tilba has a lower overall climate risk score (23/100) compared to Tilbuster (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tilba Tilba or Tilbuster safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tilba Tilba has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Tilbuster scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tilba Tilba scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Tilbuster scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tilba Tilba or Tilbuster?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tilba Tilba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
